description: Full-AOI NEON benchmark targets (issue #202 legs 1+5). Unlike targets.json (ONE pinned densest shard/target), each target here dispatches ALL shards over the AOP_NEON.geojson box, so the recorded numbers are the true full-AOI cost, not a single-cell probe. Reset-series axes per issue #202: index_backend (inline vs sidecar) x aoi_mask (on vs off), o9 shards only, tdigest/sharded/granule_workers=4 fixed. Recorded PER RELEASE (not per merge). run_full_aoi_benchmark.py builds the shardmap over the AOI+temporal+cmr below from the local full catalog, then dispatches every shard. NOT consumed by run_benchmark.py or the single-shard drift test; a NEW harness owns it (leg 4a).

dispatch.note: process-shard on the 742127912612 deployment account; dispatch with AWS profile 'nasa'. The harness asserts the caller account matches expect_account before any billed invoke.
